config.script:
"""
		Written By: Sagar Iparkar
		Written Date: 27/05/2024
		Purpose: Reset all values from panel. 
	"""
# Write your script here	
	system.perspective.closeDock('rightp')
	system.perspective.openDock("rightView")
	headerLabel = "Add"
	messageType = 'PaintingConfigurationPanel'
#	payload = {'UnitId':'','headerLabel':headerLabel,'areaId':-1,'categoryId':-1,
#				'isActive':int(1),
#				'imagePath':''}	 
	payload = {'headerLabel':headerLabel,
				'areaId':-1,
				'categoryId':-1,
				'categoryName':'',
				'areaName':'',
				'imageName':'',
				'imagePath':'',
				'stepNo':'',
				'isActive':int(1),
				'Id':'',
				'UnitId':''
				}
				
	system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType, payload)

"""
		Written By: Sagar Iparkar
		Written Date: 27/05/2024
		Purpose: Upload image in file respository location. 
	"""
	try:
	#start of try block
		area = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntArea").getChild("drpArea").props.value
		category = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntCategory").getChild("drpCategory").props.value

		
		if area != -1 and category != -1:
		
			# accessing area dropdown
			optionsArea=self.parent.parent.getChild("cntArea").getChild("drpArea").props.options
			optionsArea=system.dataset.toPyDataSet(optionsArea)
			system.perspective.print(optionsArea)
			for opt in optionsArea:
			    if opt['value'] == area:
			        area = opt['label'].lower()
			        break
			system.perspective.print(area)
			
			# accessing category dropdown
			optionsCategory=self.parent.parent.getChild("cntCategory").getChild("drpCategory").props.options
			optionsCategory=system.dataset.toPyDataSet(optionsCategory)
			system.perspective.print(optionsCategory)
			for opt1 in optionsCategory:
				if opt1['value'] == category:
					category = str(opt1['label'].lower()).strip()
					break
			system.perspective.print(category)
			
			import os
			fixedDirectory ="//srdwsmesqa01/Ignition/Painting"
	
			drpSelection=str("/"+area+"/"+category)
			directory=fixedDirectory+drpSelection
			
			#creating directory if not exist
			if not os.path.exists(directory):
			    # Create the directory
			    system.perspective.print(os.makedirs(directory))
			    #print(os.path.exists(directory))
			    system.perspective.print("Directory created successfully!")
			else:
			    system.perspective.print("Directory already exists!")
		
			#getting timestamp
			import time
			timeStamp = (str(time.time()).split("."))[0]
			system.perspective.print(timeStamp)

			#generating final image path
			imageName = str(timeStamp)

			self.custom.imageName = imageName
				
			imageName = "//"+ imageName + '.' + str(event.file.name).split('.')[-1]
			imagePath = directory + imageName
			system.perspective.print(imageName)
			system.perspective.print(imagePath)
			
			#putting url for database
			Project_VECV.Master.ImageMasterConfiguration.FileUpload.fileUpload(event, imagePath)
			
			url = "http:"+imagePath.strip()
			self.custom.url = url
			self.custom.event = event
			
			self.custom.imagePath = str('http:'+imagePath)
#			event.file.copyTo(imagePath)
#			url = "http:"+imagePath.strip()
##			url = "http:"+imagePath+imageName
#			system.perspective.print("URL = %s"%url)
##			self.getSibling("Image").props.source = url
#			self.custom.url = url #drpSelection
			
		else:
			state = 'warning'
			message = 'Please select area and category before uploading Image.'
			Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")	
	
	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='PaintingConfigurationPanel'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Pannel/Master/PaintingConfigurationPanel')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onFileReceived  -> cntImageUpload/ImageUpload')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber) 
	#End of except block

"""
		Written By: Sagar Iparkar
		Written Date: 27/05/2024
		Purpose: Reset all values from panel. 
	"""
	# Write your script here	
	system.perspective.closeDock('rightP')
	system.perspective.openDock("rightView")
	headerLabel = "Add"
	messageType = 'ImageConfigurationPanel'
	payload = {'UnitId':'','headerLabel':headerLabel,'areaId':-1,'lineId':-1,
				'WorkStationId':-1,'imageName':'','imageDescription':'','isActive':int(1),
				'imageTypeId':-1}	 			
	system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType, payload, scope = 'page' )
	try:
		url = "C:\Program Files\Inductive Automation\Ignition\webserver\webapps\main"+ self.parent.parent.getChild("cntImageUpload").getChild("ImageUpload").custom.url
		system.perspective.print("url")
		system.perspective.print(url)
		Project_VECV.Master.ImageMasterConfiguration.Delete.deleteImage(url)
	except:
		pass

"""
		Written By: Sagar Iparkar
		Written Date: 27/05/2024
		Purpose: Add/Update data in db. 
	"""
	try:
		headerlabel = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntHeader").getChild("lblHeader").props.text
		areaId = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntArea").getChild("drpArea").props.value
		categoryId = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntCategory").getChild("drpCategory").props.value
		imageName = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntImageUpload").getChild("ImageUpload").custom.imageName
		imagePath = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntImageUpload").getChild("ImageUpload").custom.imagePath
		stepNo = 1
		url = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntImageUpload").getChild("ImageUpload").custom.url
		uploadEvent = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntImageUpload").getChild("ImageUpload").custom.event
		isActive = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntActive").getChild("drpActive").props.value
		createdBy = self.session.custom.loggedInUserId
		
		
		if headerlabel == "Add":
			if Project_VECV.Master.ImageMasterConfiguration.PaintingImageUpload.upload() :
				id=0
				isActive = 1
				result=Project_VECV.NamedQuery.Master.Painting.PaintingConfiguration.insert(int(areaId), int(categoryId), imageName, imagePath, int(stepNo), int(isActive), createdBy, int(id))
				system.perspective.print("data inserted")
			else:
				system.perspective.print('image not uploaded')
		else:
			if Project_VECV.Master.ImageMasterConfiguration.PaintingImageUpload.upload() :
				Id=self.view.custom.UnitId	
				result=Project_VECV.NamedQuery.Master.Painting.PaintingConfiguration.insert(areaId, categoryId, imageName, imagePath, stepNo, isActive, createdBy, Id)	
			else:
				system.perspective.print('image not uploaded')	
		

		if(result==1):
			if headerlabel=="Add":
				message = "Painting details added successfully."
				#auditMsg=str(imagename) +" Painting details added successfully."
			else:
				message = "Painting details updated successfully."
				#auditMsg=str(imagename) +" Painting details updated successfully"
			state = "success"
#			message = 'success'

		Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")	
	
		messageType = 'tableRefresh'    	 			
		system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType,scope = 'page' )
		
		# to refresh Panel again
		headerLabel = "Add"
		messageType = 'PaintingConfigurationPanel'
			 
		payload = {'headerLabel':headerLabel,
					'areaId':-1,
					'categoryId':-1,
					'categoryName':'',
					'areaName':'',
					'imageName':'',
					'imagePath':'',
					'stepNo':'',
					'isActive':int(1),
					'Id':'',
					'UnitId':''
					}
					
		system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType, payload)
		#refresh panel ends here
		
		system.perspective.closeDock('rightp')
		system.perspective.openDock("rightView")
		
#		#addToAuditLogStartBlock
#		system.perspective.print(auditMsg)
#		category='Master Configuration'
#		subCategory='ImageMaster Configuration'
#		if(Id!=0):
#			prevDesc=self.view.getChild("root").custom.payload
#			curDesc = {
#				"modelId":model_id,
#				"areaId":area_id,
#				"lineId":line_id,
#				"workStationId":workstation_id,
#				"imageName":imagename,
#				"imageDescription":description,
#				"imageTypeId":imagetype_id,
#				"isActive":active
#			}
#			system.perspective.print(prevDesc)
#			system.perspective.print(curDesc)
#			description=str(auditMsg)+"Where ID="+str(Id)+" With Previous Data->"+str(prevDesc)+" and Updated Data->"+str(curDesc)
#		else:
#			description=str(auditMsg)
#		createdBy=self.session.custom.loggedInUserId
#		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddAuditLogs(category, subCategory, description, createdBy)
#		#addAuditLogEndBlock
	except:
		screenName ='Painting Configuration'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Pannel/PaintingConfigurationPannel')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onActionPerformed -> cntSave/btn_Save')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber) 
	#End of except block

messageHandlers.script:
# implement your handler here
	load=payload.copy()
	system.perspective.print("Printing payload of msg handler----------->")
	system.perspective.print(payload)
	load.pop('headerLabel')
	system.perspective.print("msg handler1----------->")
	import json
	load_json = json.dumps(load)
	self.view.getChild("root").custom.payload=load_json
	system.perspective.print("msg handler2----------->")
	system.perspective.print("payload msghandler3------------->")
	system.perspective.print(self.view.getChild("root").custom.payload)
	system.perspective.print("Exit ImageConfigurationPanel")

"""
		Written By: Sagar Iparkar

	except:
